message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="lea-verou" color="blue">
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"1","subject":"Fix password toggle: add hidden input mirror for server-side validation","description":"When the JS password visibility toggle is active, it removes the confirm field from the DOM. This means the form submits without a password_confirmation value. The server (RegisterFormData) expects password_confirmation as a required String field and will reject with 422.

Fix: when the toggle removes the confirm field, insert a hidden input that mirrors the password value so the server contract is maintained. This is purely a frontend fix — zero Rust changes needed.

Driver: Lea Verou (TypeScript/frontend expertise)
TDD: Write test first, implement, verify green, commit+push, CI green, get 9/9 consensus.","assignedBy":"lea-verou","timestamp":"2026-02-08T22:19:24.170Z"}
</teammate-message>

content.text: That's my own task assignment message echoed back to me. Task #1 is already completed (commit fe1009a, CI green, 9/9 consensus reached). No action needed.
